title: zornia glabra
intro: Zornia glabra, also known as smooth zornia, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Fabaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Zornia glabra include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to facilitate its various health benefits.
